race.comment: DESERT STAR (2) ran a nice race last time out, finishing second and beaten only one length over 1600m at Barcaldine. Only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to be featuring in the finish. EASTCOAST HUSSLER (4) has progressed nicely in his last couple of runs. Finished third at Emerald two starts back then scored by a nose last time out over 1200m at Ilfracombe. Well placed and there is no reason why he cannot score again. MONDAY CHOICE (8) could only manage eighth two runs back then improved last start when she worked home well but found a couple better over 1300m at Barcaldine, beaten only 1.1 lengths. Has her share of ability and will prove hard to beat in this suitable race. VALUBIOUS (9) was out of the money when resuming from a spell last start over 1000m at Barcaldine, beaten 7 lengths. Strips fitter now and is a likely improver with strong top-three prospects.
